one_time_description: Income from First Nation Entities (government business enterprises) recorded as other income
economic_notes: Nation holds investments in multiple government business enterprises including Burns Lake Native Development Corporation, Lake Babine Economic Development Society, Woyenne Enterprises Ltd., Talok Fisheries Ltd., Talok Fisheries Limited Partnership, Lake Babine Nation Forestry Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Forestry Limited Partnership, Lake Babine Nation Construction Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Ventures Ltd., Lake Babine Nation Ventures LP, Nedut'een Development Corp., Fort Babine Lake Property Ltd., 1203001 B.C. Ltd., BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to investments in government business enterprises accounted for under modified equity method — none of these GBEs have audited financial information available, so auditors could not determine if adjustments were necessary. Nation consolidates Lake Babine Nation Health Services Fund as a subsidiary. Deferred revenue increased dramatically from $8.4M to $32.6M, likely due to large unspent government transfers. Short-term deposits increased from $11.7M to $42.3M. ISC funding identified as Federal Government line. Total government transfers include Federal ($22,887,827) + Provincial ($14,221,182) = $37,109,009. OSR includes Band Generated + Miscellaneous + First Nations Gaming + Interest income + negative deferred revenue adjustment.
